About Me

I'm ezekiel

I am a passionate web developer with experience in building responsive and interactive websites. I love working with modern web technologies to create beautiful and user-friendly experiences. Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Information Systems at Bulacan State University. Programming is my passion, and I enjoy continuously learning and improving my skills.
